_comment.purpose: Add purpl-brain MCP server to Claude Code. Merge the `mcpServers` block below into your ~/.claude/settings.json. Replace the absolute path under `args` with the actual path to dist/index.js in your checkout.

env_vars.BRAIN_API_URL: Base URL of the running purpl-brain API. Default http://localhost:3741 for local dev; set to your deployed brain URL otherwise.
env_vars.BRAIN_API_KEY: Bearer/X-API-Key token issued by the brain. Required for /brain/agent-log (decision write-back) and any other authenticated endpoints.
env_vars.BRAIN_AGENT_ID: Identifier written into every decision this client logs. Use 'claude-code' so logged decisions show up as Claude Code sessions in the brain UI.
